div1.entryFree:
Riotous, 1) tumultuous, seditious: his r. youth, with dangerous sense, might have ta'en revenge, Meas. IV, 4, 32. shall it charm thy r. tongue, H6B IV, 1, 64. slew a r. gentleman, R3 II, 1, 100. Laertes, in a r. head, o'erbears your officers, Hml. IV, 5, 101. his knights grow r. Lr. I, 3, 6.
2) dissolute: Tim. II, 2, 168. Lr. I, 4, 265. II, 1, 96.
3) excessive, knowing no restraint: goes to it with a more r. appetite, Lr. IV, 6, 125. r. madness, to be entangled with those mouth-made vows, Ant. I, 3, 29.
